LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonSuccessDesc: {0} answers the sigil. A hostile breach signature has entered the map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoMap: This sigil can only be used while the pawn is standing on an active map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoEdge: No valid breach point was found near the map edge.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_EncounterActive: An abyssal encounter is already active on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoCircle: No abyssal summoning circle is available on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllBusy: All abyssal summoning circles are currently busy.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllUnpowered: All abyssal summoning circles are unpowered.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllBlocked: All abyssal summoning circles are blocked.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoCircleAvailable: No abyssal summoning circle is currently ready.
LanguageData.ABY_SecretBossRevealDesc: The beast died before completing its first phase. The kill did not end the protocol. A greater breach is forming.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisCompleteDesc: The recovered fragment has been successfully decoded at a hi-tech research bench. {0} and {1} are now accessible through the Abyssal Protocol research tab.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisAlreadyKnown: Herald fragment analysis is already complete. The fragment was returned.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisFailedMissingProject: Herald fragment analysis could not be resolved because the required research project was missing. The fragment was returned.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilPlacementFailed: Failed to place the sigil on the abyssal circle.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoHostileFaction: No valid hostile faction was available for abyssal manifestation.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoBossArrival: No valid boss arrival mode could be resolved.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleInspect_StalledNoPower: Ritual stalled: the circle has no power.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NotPlaced: The circle must be placed on a map first.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_Busy: The circle is already running an active ritual.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoPower: The circle requires power before a sigil can be activated.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_FocusBlocked: The ritual focus cell is blocked.
LanguageData.ABY_FirstBossKillDesc: The first archon beast has been destroyed. A herald core fragment can now be analyzed at a hi-tech research bench to unlock Herald-grade research paths.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldIntegrationUnlockedDesc: Abyssal augmentation was already complete, so herald implant integration has been finalized automatically.
LanguageData.ABY_SignalTheoryGuidanceDesc: Abyssal signal theory is complete. Build an Abyssal Forge to produce the first sigils and begin controlled breach work.
LanguageData.ABY_FirstSigilGuidanceDesc: A crafted archon sigil is now available. Bring it to a powered abyssal summoning circle with a clear focus cell to begin the encounter.
